description: Analyze the protein-RNA pi-stacking interactions in the U1A spliceosome complex using crystal structure PDB:1URN. Identify the specific RNA bases (Chain B) that pi-stack against the highly conserved protein RRM aromatic residues Tyr13 and Phe56 (Chain A). Measure the minimum heavy-atom distance from each of these two sidechains to their respective stacking RNA bases. Create a publication-quality figure highlighting these two stacking pairs (showing the residues and bases as sticks) and write a structural analysis report. Save the figure to ~/PyMOL_Data/images/u1a_rna_stacking.png and the text report to ~/PyMOL_Data/rna_stacking_report.txt. The report must explicitly name the two RNA bases (e.g., 'Guanine 15') and state the measured distances in Angstroms.
